Registry / Terms / error (of indication)

error (of indication)

VIMOutdated — VIM 1993 G 18 #00654 · 23 instances

Authoritative definition

VIM 1993 · concept #5.20view ↗

indication of a measuring instrument minus a true value of the corresponding input quantity

Outdated: Cites VIM 1993. Latest: VIM 2012.
  • VIM 1993 · #5.20
    indication of a measuring instrument minus a true value of the corresponding input quantity
  • VIM 1993 · #5.24
    error of a measuring instrument, determined under reference conditions

Suggested actions

  1. HIGH ✗ This term is NOT in VIM 2012.
  2. MEDIUM 20 distinct definitions — harmonise.

Publication instances

20 distinct definitions across 23 publications. 3 definitions are shared by multiple publications (merge candidates).

2 identical202X2010
indicated quantity value minus the reference (true) quantity value
